stemHtml: An aircraft on approach to a controlled aerodrome loses radio communication and is unable to reach the appropriate frequency. What is the correct action for the crew to take?

options.a: Proceed with the approach and land provided the runway appears to be clear.
options.b: Overfly the aerodrome at 1000 ft and watch for tower signals.
options.c: Fly past the control tower at 500 ft while rocking the wings.
options.d: Activate navigation and/or landing lights to draw attention.
